solutions.solution: All Ds are As. All As are Cs. A + A = A-type conclusion. All Ds are Cs = Conclusion I. All Ds are As = implication Some Ds are As = Conclusion II. Hence, both Conclusions I and II follow. (C) Trees Plants or Trees Plants with Bushes. I. Atleast some trees are bushes. II. Some trees are definitely not bushes. Complementary pair (I-O)
Glasses Bottles Cup. I. No bottle is a cup. II. Atleast some glasses are bottles. (B)
Rings Bangle Earrings or Rings Bangles Earrings or Rings Earrings Bangles. I. No ring is a bangle. II. Some rings are definitely not earrings. (D)
Seats Belts or Seats Belts Hots. I. All seats are belts. II. All hots are either seats or belts. (D)
Tests Exams Questions. I. Atleast some exams are questions. II. No exam is a question. (D)
Oceans Lakes Rivers. I. All rivers are oceans. II. Some oceans are lakes. (E)
Schools Banks Colleges or Schools Banks Colleges. I. Atleast some banks are schools. II. All schools are colleges. (C)
Exams Tests Questions or Exams Tests Questions. I. No question is a test. II. Some tests are definitely not exams. (D)
Tyres Wires Fires or Tyres Wires Fires. I. Atleast some tyres are wires. II. Some fires are definitely not wires. (C)
